items.title: Add hard core-vs-extension boundary contract and guardrails
items.request: Create a clear architecture contract that tells agents what core NanoClaw files are not supposed to carry Jarvis-specific logic, what can be extended, and enforce it with deterministic checks.
notes: 2026-03-06T18:25:00.000Z: Starting architecture-governance pass after identifying that current docs describe the boundary but do not constrain agents strongly enough.
2026-03-06T18:25:00.000Z: Planned outputs: root architecture contract, CLAUDE/AGENTS trigger update, docs index update, and deterministic architecture-boundary checker.

2026-03-06T18:40:00.000Z: Added the architecture boundary contract as the canonical ownership contract, wired retrieval through CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md, updated docs/README.md and DOCS.md, and added scripts/check-architecture-boundary.sh backed by workflow-contract verification.

items.title: Relocate architecture boundary contract into docs root
items.request: Move the architecture boundary contract into docs/ alongside MISSION.md and update every trigger, inventory, and enforcement script to the new path.
notes: 2026-03-06T18:25:47.000Z: Starting contract relocation from repo root into docs/ so boundary guidance lives with the other top-level docs authorities.
2026-03-06T18:25:47.000Z: Scope includes CLAUDE/AGENTS/DOCS references, deterministic boundary checks, and feature catalog metadata.

2026-03-06T18:27:21.000Z: Moved the contract to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, updated all architecture-boundary references and verification scripts, regenerated the feature catalog, and passed architecture-boundary/workflow-contract/mirror/tooling-governance checks.

items.title: Extract Jarvis extension boundary from core control loop
items.request: Implement the planned Jarvis extension architecture: explicit extension modules, lane identity, dispatch-attempt state, and reduced Jarvis policy in core files.
notes: 2026-03-06T15:30:00.000Z: Start architecture extraction from src/index.ts, src/ipc.ts, and src/db.ts into explicit Jarvis extension modules.
2026-03-06T15:30:00.000Z: Constraints locked from plan: preserve single-process NanoClaw core, keep filesystem IPC/SQLite, use lane ids with synthetic @nanoclaw JID compatibility during migration.

2026-03-06T17:53:00.000Z: Implemented src/extensions/jarvis/* modules, additive DB schema for dispatch_attempts/lane ids, and rewired src/index.ts + src/ipc.ts to delegate Jarvis policy through the extension boundary.
2026-03-06T18:08:00.000Z: Local verification passed: npm run typecheck, focused Jarvis tests, npm test, npm run build, verify-worker-connectivity PASS, linkage-audit PASS.
2026-03-06T18:09:00.000Z: Live restarted-build validation is currently blocked by incident-20260306T180837Z (WhatsApp conflict type=replaced after restart).

items.title: Stabilize Andy E2E gate timestamp ordering
items.request: Avoid false timeout when bot reply timestamp truncates to second and appears slightly before probe timestamp.
notes: 2026-03-03T07:38:30.947Z: Adjusted E2E timestamp tolerance; eliminated false timeout when reply timestamp truncates to whole second.
